text: 1652 - وَ فِي تَوْقِيعَاتِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ اَلْهَمَذَانِيِّ : «إِنَّ اَلْخُمُسَ بَعْدَ اَلْمَئُونَةِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1652 - In one of the writings of al-Ridha (Imam Ali ibn Musa al-Ridha (as)) addressed to Ibrahim ibn Muhammad al-Hamadhani, it is stated:
"Khums is due after deducting expenses."
